filters.q: subject:(invoice OR receipt OR tax OR VAT OR HMRC OR statement OR remittance OR PAYE OR P60 OR P45) OR has:attachment

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ message: 'You are the Finance Operations Controller for Bridge Digital. You handle invoices, tax letters, VAT, expenses, bookkeeping, cash flow, and financial reporting. You also know UK tax deadlines (VAT quarters, Self Assessment Jan 31, PAYE monthly). Answer clearly and concisely: ' + $json.text, session_id: $json.source_channel + '_qa_' + $json.sender_id }) }}

parameters.jsCode: const resp=$input.first().json.response||'No response from finance assistant.';const orig=$('Has Document?').item.json;return[{json:{...orig,ai_response:resp}}];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ message: 'You are a financial document extraction specialist for Bridge Digital. Extract ALL financial data from this document. Document type: ' + $json.doc_type + '. Subject/context: ' + ($json.subject||$json.text||'None') + '. Return ONLY a valid JSON object: { vendor: string, document_type: string, reference_number: string, date: string (YYYY-MM-DD), due_date: string|null, amount: number, tax_amount: number, currency: string, description: string, key_details: string, line_items: array, source_channel: "' + $json.source_channel + '", sender_id: "' + $json.sender_id + '", sender_email: ' + JSON.stringify($json.sender_email) + ', doc_type: "' + $json.doc_type + '" }', session_id: 'ai_extract_' + Date.now() }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ message: 'You are a finance data validation specialist for Bridge Digital. Validate and enrich this extracted financial document data. Fix OCR errors, normalise dates to YYYY-MM-DD, normalise amounts to 2 decimal places, fill missing fields where possible. Return ONLY valid JSON: { vendor: string, invoice_number: string, date: string, due_date: string|null, amount: number, tax_amount: number, currency: string, line_items: array, payment_terms: string, po_number: string, document_type: string, description: string, extraction_confidence: number }. Input: ' + JSON.stringify($json), session_id: 'enhanced_' + Date.now() }) }}

parameters.jsCode: const resp=$input.first().json.response||'{}';let origData={};try{origData=$('Normalize Mindee Output').item.json;}catch(e){}if(!origData.source_channel){try{origData=$('Parse AI Extract').item.json;}catch(e){}}if(!origData.source_channel){try{origData=$('Parse Table / CSV').item.json;}catch(e){}}let parsed;try{const match=resp.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/);parsed=JSON.parse(match?match[0]:resp);}catch(e){parsed={};}return[{json:{...origData,...parsed,source_channel:origData.source_channel||'unknown',sender_id:origData.sender_id||'unknown',sender_email:origData.sender_email||null,doc_type:origData.doc_type||parsed.document_type||'invoice',amount:parseFloat(parsed.amount||origData.amount||0),tax_amount:parseFloat(parsed.tax_amount||origData.tax_amount||0),currency:parsed.currency||origData.currency||'GBP',date:parsed.date||origData.date||new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]}}];

parameters.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as duplicate_count FROM expenses WHERE LOWER(vendor) = LOWER($1) AND ABS(amount - $2::numeric) < 0.50 AND date = $3 AND processed_date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'

parameters.subject: =🔁 Duplicate Invoice Blocked: {{ $('Parse Enhanced Extraction').item.json.vendor }} — £{{ $('Parse Enhanced Extraction').item.json.amount }}
parameters.message:
=

Duplicate Invoice Detected — Processing Stopped

A document matching an existing record was received and not stored to prevent duplication.

Vendor{{ $('Parse Enhanced Extraction').item.json.vendor }}
Amount{{ $('Parse Enhanced Extraction').item.json.currency }} {{ $('Parse Enhanced Extraction').item.json.amount }}
Date{{ $('Parse Enhanced Extraction').item.json.date }}
Source{{ $('Parse Enhanced Extraction').item.json.source_channel }} — {{ $('Parse Enhanced Extraction').item.json.sender_id }}

If this is a legitimate new invoice, check the expenses log and re-submit with a different invoice number.

parameters.jsCode:
const orig = $('Parse Enhanced Extraction').item.json;
return [{ json: orig }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ message: 'You are a senior finance analyst for Bridge Digital. Categorise and analyse this financial document. 1) CATEGORY: assign primary (Office Supplies, Travel, Marketing, Software/SaaS, Professional Services, Utilities, Rent, Payroll, Tax/HMRC, Insurance, Equipment, Training, Subscriptions, Other) and subcategory. 2) ANOMALY CHECK: flag duplicates, unusual amounts, suspicious vendors, missing required fields, tax errors. 3) PRIORITY: low/medium/high/urgent. Return ONLY valid JSON: { category: string, subcategory: string, vendor: string, amount: number, date: string, description: string, anomaly_flag: boolean, anomaly_severity: "none"|"low"|"medium"|"high"|"critical", anomaly_reason: string, anomaly_recommendations: array, confidence_score: number, budget_line: string, priority: string, action_required: string }. Document: ' + JSON.stringify($json), session_id: 'categorize' }) }}

parameters.jsCode: const resp=$input.first().json.response||'{}';let origData={};try{origData=$('Restore Invoice Data').item.json;}catch(e){}let parsed;try{const match=resp.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/);parsed=JSON.parse(match?match[0]:resp);}catch(e){parsed={category:'Uncategorized',anomaly_flag:true,anomaly_severity:'high',anomaly_reason:'Parse failure',anomaly_recommendations:['Manual review required'],confidence_score:0,priority:'high',action_required:'Manual review'};}return[{json:{...origData,...parsed,anomaly_recommendations:Array.isArray(parsed.anomaly_recommendations)?parsed.anomaly_recommendations.join('; '):(parsed.anomaly_recommendations||''),processed_date:new Date().toISOString()}}];
